results.rendered_html:
anuśayin a.
1 Devotedly attached to, faithful.
2 Repentant, penitent, regretful, sorry.
3 Hating intensely.
4 Connected as with a consequence.
5 Enjoying the fruits of deeds; epithet of the soul.
